name: Gun Mayhem Original
description: Gun Mayhem is a high octane arena style versus game! Battle with or against AI and friends alike in this cartoony platform shooter. - Supports up to 4 players at once - Utilize over 60 different firearms - 12 diverse maps to fight on - 4 unique gameplay modes: Last Man Standing, One Shot One Kill, Gun Game and Duck Defense - Campaign mode includes coop option - Customizable characters
instructions: Controls can be edited in game option Arrow Keys - Movement Left Square Bracket - Shoot Right Square Bracket - Throw Bomb Players 2 - 4 Controls can be edited in options
tags: 1 Player, 2 Player, 2D, Action, Game, Games, HTML, HTML5, Online, Shooting
